source.quote: ...as a baseline, users should be informed of the agent's range of actions, access to data, and the user's own responsibilities.

requirements.normativeText: User-facing documentation must disclose (a) the agent's permitted actions, (b) the data it can access, (c) user obligations when reviewing its output.

source.quote: Organisations should consider layering on training to equip employees with the knowledge required to manage human-agent interactions and exercise effective oversight, while maintaining their tradecraft and foundational skills.

requirements.normativeText: Employees using the agent must complete training that covers automation-bias mitigation and preservation of core tradecraft skills.

implementation.note: Three-level curriculum (Awareness, Reviewer skills, Oversight depth) with explicit automation-bias self-check card.

verification.checklistItem: Training completion tracked in SuccessFactors LMS; monthly report to Council.
